extension.description: Live view of Claude Code TodoWrite tool for the current workspace
view.todos.name: Todos
command.openPanel.title: Claude Todos: Open in Editor
command.installHook.title: Claude Todos: Install Session Hook
command.refresh.title: Claude Todos: Refresh
command.pickSession.title: Claude Todos: Choose Session
config.autoInstallHook.description: Prompt to install session hook on first launch
config.language.description: UI language for the Claude Todos panel. 'auto' follows VS Code's display language. Note: command titles in the Command Palette always follow VS Code's display language.
config.notifications.description: Show a notification when the tracked session goes idle after activity, or completes all tasks (only while the VS Code window is unfocused).
config.activeFolder.description: Multi-root only: name (or absolute path) of the workspace folder to track. Empty = follow the most recently active session across all folders.
walkthrough.title: Get started with Claude Todos
walkthrough.description: Live observability for your Claude Code agents — set up the session hook and explore the panel.
walkthrough.installHook.title: Install the session hook
walkthrough.installHook.description:
The hook tells the panel which Claude Code session belongs to this workspace. It adds two entries to ~/.claude/settings.json; existing hooks and settings are preserved.
[Install Hook](command:claudeTodos.installHook)
walkthrough.startSession.title: Start a Claude Code session
walkthrough.startSession.description: Run ``claude`` in any terminal — integrated or external — inside this workspace's folder. Sessions that were already running are detected on the next message you send them.
walkthrough.openPanel.title: Open the panel
walkthrough.openPanel.description:
Tasks, agents and token usage update live as the agent works.
[Open Panel](command:claudeTodos.openPanel)
Tip: ``Ctrl+Alt+T`` (``Cmd+Alt+T`` on macOS).
walkthrough.pickSession.title: Choose the session
walkthrough.pickSession.description:
The panel follows the most active session automatically — pin a specific one whenever you want.
[Choose Session](command:claudeTodos.pickSession)
Tip: ``Ctrl+Alt+S`` (``Cmd+Alt+S`` on macOS).
walkthrough.explore.title: Explore the agent tree and usage
walkthrough.explore.description: Expand sub-agents to see nested agents, per-task timing and per-agent tokens. The "Last 7 days" block aggregates project usage by model and by agent type.
